summary: Audience recording captures a storm‑hit show where the Dead power through a blackout with an inspiring jam.
review: The reviewer describes a thrilling first‑time experience, noting how a sudden stadium-wide power outage was met with the band diving straight back into their improvisations. The recording picks up crowd ambience and even the lightning’s crackle, giving listeners a vivid sense of the night despite any technical imperfections.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic 5‑star review; show quality is clearly excellent while recording details are sparse, leading to a strong but uncertain overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Captures crowd noise, lightning and the moment of power loss; no specific complaints about clarity, suggesting a listenable though ambient‑rich tape.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Unique event – a storm caused a brief blackout, after which the band launched straight into an extended jam, keeping momentum high throughout the set.
